"'''Father's Heir'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Eric Cagle]] and published in [[2005]]. It depicts an alternate version of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']], in which [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], now [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] apprentice, battles against his old allies.

==Plot summary==
During the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] succeeded in converting [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. His friends fled the battle, no longer sensing him. They were then captured on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] and brought before the Emperor on [[Coruscant]] and tortured for a week about the Rebellion.

Afterward, they were brought before the Emperor, who had one final test for his new apprentice.
